minimum_roles_responsibilities.description: Owns product strategy, pricing, deployment model, and operational rules. Manages B2B partnerships and revenue model execution.
Develops and maintains IoT hardware, firmware, backend systems, and connectivity protocols. Ensures device reliability and security.
Manages device installation, inventory tracking, provisioning, and field support. Coordinates with logistics partners for locker placement.

operational_needs: Onboarding e-commerce, courier, and retail partners for locker integration
Device health monitoring and connectivity tracking
Incident resolution for hardware failures and connectivity issues
Inventory management for units, spare parts, and replacements
Coordination with logistics providers for last-mile delivery optimization
Customer support for locker access issues and usage guidance
materials_equipment: Packaging materials for shipping and installation

physical_presence_needs.site_requirements: Urban installation locations in Tunis, Sfax, Sousse, and university/apartment zones
physical_presence_needs.storage: Minimal, focused on spare parts and field-ready units
physical_presence_needs.field_presence: Required for locker installation, maintenance, and partner coordination
physical_presence_needs.remote_operations: Supported via IoT systems for device monitoring and support

tools_stack.description: Tracks device status, firmware updates, and connectivity health
Manages locker access control, delivery notifications, and data synchronization
Monitors unit deployment, spare parts stock, and replacement scheduling
Facilitates onboarding, locker integration, and performance reporting for B2B clients
Handles user inquiries, access issues, and service requests
